title: Velorah 시네마틱 히어로
description: 풀스크린 루핑 비디오 배경 + Liquid Glass 네비게이션 + 시네마틱 타이포그래피. Instrument Serif × Inter 폰트, HSL 다크 테마, fade-rise 애니메이션 내장. ChatGPT·Gemini에 붙여넣기만으로 단일 HTML 파일 생성.
prompt:
Create a single standalone HTML file (no build tools, no npm, no frameworks). The entire page must work by opening the .html file directly in a browser.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENT:
- One complete .html file only
- All CSS inside <style> tags in <head>
- No external CSS files, no Tailwind CDN, no JavaScript frameworks
- Only allowed external resource: Google Fonts via <link>

---

DESIGN: Velorah — Cinematic Hero Page

FONTS (load via Google Fonts link tag):
  Instrument Serif (display headings)
  Inter 400, 500 (body text)
CSS variables:
  --font-display: 'Instrument Serif', serif
  --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif

COLOR THEME (dark):
  --background: hsl(201, 100%, 13%)
  --foreground: hsl(0, 0%, 100%)
  --muted-foreground: hsl(240, 4%, 66%)

---

VIDEO BACKGROUND:
  <video> element: autoplay loop muted playsinline
  position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; z-index: 0
  Source: https://d8j0ntlcm91z4.cloudfront.net/user_38xzZboKViGWJOttwIXH07lWA1P/hf_20260314_131748_f2ca2a28-fed7-44c8-b9a9-bd9acdd5ec31.mp4

---

LIQUID GLASS CSS CLASS (.liquid-glass):
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.01);
  background-blend-mode: luminosity;
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  border: none;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  ::before pseudo-element:
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; padding: 1.4px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 60%, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 80%, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%);
    -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
    -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude; pointer-events: none;

---

ANIMATIONS:
  @keyframes fade-rise { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
  .animate-fade-rise         { animation: fade-rise 0.8s ease-out 0.0s both; }
  .animate-fade-rise-delay   { animation: fade-rise 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both; }
  .animate-fade-rise-delay-2 { animation: fade-rise 0.8s ease-out 0.4s both; }

---

NAVIGATION BAR:
  position: relative; z-index: 10;
  Layout: flex row, space-between, align-center, padding 24px 32px, max-width 1280px, margin auto
  Logo: text 'Velorah' + superscript R symbol, font-family Instrument Serif, font-size 1.875rem, letter-spacing -0.025em
  Nav links (hide on mobile below 768px, show on desktop): Home (active/white), Studio, About, Journal, Reach Us
    font-size 0.875rem, color var(--muted-foreground), hover color var(--foreground), transition colors
  CTA button: text 'Begin Journey', apply .liquid-glass, border-radius 9999px, padding 10px 24px, font-size 0.875rem, color var(--foreground), hover scale(1.03)

---

HERO SECTION:
  position: relative; z-index: 10; flex: 1;
  Layout: flex column, align-center, justify-center, text-center, padding 128px 24px 160px
  H1: Where [muted]dreams[/muted] rise [muted]through the silence.[/muted]
    muted words use color var(--muted-foreground), normal font-style
    font-family Instrument Serif, font-size clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7.5rem), line-height 0.95, letter-spacing -2.46px, font-weight 400
    apply .animate-fade-rise
  Subtext: 'We're designing tools for deep thinkers, bold creators, and quiet rebels. Amid the chaos, we build digital spaces for sharp focus and inspired work.'
    color var(--muted-foreground), font-size clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.125rem), max-width 672px, margin-top 32px, line-height 1.75
    apply .animate-fade-rise-delay
  CTA button: text 'Begin Journey', apply .liquid-glass, border-radius 9999px, padding 20px 56px, font-size 1rem, color var(--foreground), margin-top 48px, hover scale(1.03)
    apply .animate-fade-rise-delay-2

---

LAYOUT RULES:
  No decorative blobs, radial gradients, or overlays
  Minimalist and cinematic — the video provides all visual depth
  body background: var(--background) as fallback when video loads
  Page wrapper: position relative; z-index 1; min-height 100vh; display flex; flex-direction column
